# Contemplative Science

Contemplative science connects psychological research with practices and traditions concerned with attention, ethics, wisdom, compassion, and self-transformation.

## Current focus

- Mindfulness
- Loving-kindness
- Compassion
- Self-regulation
- Psychological interventions

## Working note

This domain can connect earlier work on loving-kindness, embodiment, mindfulness, and prosocial change with newer projects on books, identity, and public-facing interventions.
